tree.text: Past perfect continuous | I had been doing (过去完成进行时)

children.text: Timeline: Something had been happening before something else happened in the past (在过去某个动作或事件之前一直持续发生的动作)
Structure: had + been + -ing (working / playing / doing etc.) (构成：had been + 现在分词)
Negative: hadn't been doing; Question: Had you been doing? (否定使用 hadn't been -ing，疑问句助动词 had 提前)
Present Perfect Continuous vs Past Perfect Continuous: have been waiting (before now) vs had been waiting (before a past point) (现在完成进行时表示持续到现在 vs 过去完成进行时表示持续到过去某一刻之前)
Past Continuous vs Past Perfect Continuous: was raining (raining at that time) vs had been raining (raining before that time, ground is wet) (过去进行时描述过去那一刻动作正在进行 vs 过去完成进行时描述过去那一刻之前动作一直在进行)
Non-Continuous Verbs (非进行时动词限制)
Verbs like 'know' or 'have' (as state) are not normally used in continuous forms (诸如 know, have（表示拥有）等静态动词不能使用进行时态)
Use past perfect simple instead: had known / she'd always had (使用过去完成时替代：had known 而不是 had been knowing)
Verbs (动词): repair (修理) / cancel (取消) / dream (做梦)
Others (名代形副): breath (呼吸) / heavily (猛烈地) / impatient (不耐烦的) / frightened (害怕的) / difficulty (困难) / orchestra (管弦乐队) / audience (观众)
My hands were dirty because I'd been repairing my bike. (我的手很脏，因为我一直在修理我的自行车。)
At last the bus came. I'd been waiting for 20 minutes. (公交车终于来了。我当时已经等了20分钟了。)
We were good friends. We had known each other for years. (我们是好朋友。我们认识很多年了。)
